description: Arcwright Template Library — Reusable game patterns for automated game creation

collectibles.description: Pickups, coins, power-ups that players collect

triggers.description: Victory zones, checkpoints, teleporters, pressure plates, levers

enemies.description: AI enemies with patrol, chase, attack behaviors

managers.description: Game managers, score trackers, wave spawners

movement.description: Moving platforms, rotating actors, patrolling objects

player.description: Player character setups: FPS, third person, top-down
